highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.5 is a servicing release that syncs upstream Skia bug fixes and restores WASM startup on .NET 10 RC.

bullets.detail: Picks up the latest bug and stability fixes from Skia's chrome/m133 branch, keeping rendering behaviour aligned with upstream without moving the engine milestone.
Resolves a regression that prevented the SkiaSharp WASM module from initializing under the .NET 10 release candidate runtime.

bullets.lead: SKColorSpace equality corrected for named spaces
bullets.detail: Two SKColorSpace instances that refer to the same named colour space (such as sRGB) now compare as equal, matching what callers expect.
